issues.sample: RANDOMLY, AFTER STARTING THE VEHICLE AND MOVING THE SHIFT LEVER TO REVERSE, THE EMERGENCY BRAKE INDEPENDENTLY SETS SUCH THAT PARK IS DISPLAYED ON THE DASH AS WELL AS REVERSE. IN OTHER WORDS, THE VEHICLE IS IN BOTH REVERSE AND PARK SIMULTANEOUSLY AS DISPLAYED ON THE DASH DISPLAY.

MULTIPLE ISSUES WITH GARAGE REMOTE CONTROL BUTTONS NOT FUNCTIONING.  ISSUE WITH DRIVER SEAT NOT VIBRATING WHEN VEHICLE VENTURES OUT OF LANE WITH "LANE ASSIST" FEATURE ON.  VEHICLE SHUT DOWN WHILE DRIVING ON HIGHWAY SENDING MULTIPLE WARNINGS ABOUT ENGINE MALFUNCTION, PARKING BRAKE

narrative.headline: What 2017 Cadillac Xt5 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 118 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Power Train (20% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.

issues.sample: RANDOMLY, AFTER STARTING THE VEHICLE AND MOVING THE SHIFT LEVER TO REVERSE, THE EMERGENCY BRAKE INDEPENDENTLY SETS SUCH THAT PARK IS DISPLAYED ON THE DASH AS WELL AS REVERSE. IN OTHER WORDS, THE VEHICLE IS IN BOTH REVERSE AND PARK SIMULTANEOUSLY AS DISPLAYED ON THE DASH DISPLAY.
